ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "component_type" TEXT /* Type of component (e.g., CPU, DRAM, Peripheral) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the component */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the component */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model number of the component */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number of the component */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was installed */,
  "decommission_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was decommissioned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zones" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zone */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the zone */,
  "zone_description" TEXT /* Description of the zone */,
  "zone_location" TEXT /* Physical location of the zone */,
  "zone_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the zone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being monitored */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the zone where the component is located */,
  "time_elapsed" REAL /* Time elapsed since the last reading */,
  "power_j" REAL /* Power consumption in joules */,
  "watts" REAL /* Power consumption in watts */,
  "watts_since_last" REAL /* Change in power consumption since the last reading */,
  "start_power" REAL /* Initial power consumption */,
  "prev_power" REAL /* Previous power consumption */,
  "prev_power_reading" REAL /* Previous power reading */,
  "temp" REAL /* Temperature reading */,
  "data_collection_method_id" INTEGER /* Method used to collect the reading */,
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Integration used to collect the reading */,
  "reading_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of readings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readings_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "power_types" (
  "power_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each power type */,
  "power_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the power type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the power type */,
  "power_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the power type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("power_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thermal_zones" (
  "thermal_zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each thermal zone */,
  "thermal_zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the thermal zone */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the thermal zone */,
  "temperature_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the thermal zone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("thermal_zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_readings" (
  "temperature_reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature reading */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being monitored */,
  "thermal_zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the thermal zone */,
  "time_elapsed" REAL /* Time elapsed since the last reading */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature reading */,
  "data_collection_method_id" INTEGER /* Method used to collect the temperature reading */,
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Integration used to collect the temperature reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("temperature_reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_readings_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_readings_thermal_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("thermal_zone_id") REFERENCES thermal_zones ("thermal_zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, engineer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component triggering the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., energy usage, temperature) */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Alert message */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "alert_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the alert (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being reported */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Report data */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_methods" (
  "data_collection_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection method */,
  "data_collection_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data collection method */,
  "method_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the data collection method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_collection_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "integration_name" TEXT /* Name of the integration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the integration */,
  "integration_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the integration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id")
)
